mapper.select: SELECT c.*, m.content as last_message_content, cm.unread_count, (SELECT JSON_ARRAYAGG(JSON_OBJECT( 'userId', u.id, 'userName', u.real_name, 'userAvatar', u.avatar, 'userType', u.user_type )) FROM conversation_members cm2 JOIN sys_user u ON cm2.user_id = u.id WHERE cm2.conversation_id = c.id AND cm2.is_left = 0 ) as participants FROM conversations c JOIN conversation_members cm ON c.id = cm.conversation_id AND cm.is_left = 0 LEFT JOIN messages m ON c.last_message_id = m.id WHERE cm.user_id = #{userId} AND c.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY c.last_active_time DESC
SELECT DISTINCT conversation_id FROM conversation_members WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_left = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE conversations SET last_message_id = #{lastMessageId}, last_active_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{conversationId}
mapper.select: SELECT c.*, m.content as last_message_content, cm.unread_count FROM conversations c JOIN conversation_members cm ON c.id = cm.conversation_id AND cm.is_left = 0 LEFT JOIN messages m ON c.last_message_id = m.id WHERE cm.user_id = #{userId} AND c.is_deleted = 0 AND ( c.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM conversation_members cm2 JOIN sys_user u ON cm2.user_id = u.id WHERE cm2.conversation_id = c.id AND cm2.is_left = 0 AND u.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) ) ORDER BY c.last_active_time DESC
